svg.text: One epoch = all 8 items, one at a time

g.text: Forward pass (repeat for each of 8 items)
Backward pass (gradient descent on W₁ and W₂)
W₁ ← W₁ − lr · ∂L/∂W₁ , W₂ ← W₂ − lr · ∂L/∂W₂
lr = 0.003, nudge weights to reduce error

svg.text: What this looks like over training

g.text: All predictions ≈ average of all features
Each prediction close to its true features

svg.text: The interesting part is the middle

g.text: dog and cat share a prediction (both "mammal")
dog and sparrow diverge (mammal vs bird) ← sign flip happens here
